title: Concertina sweet potatoes
excerpt: Ingredients 8 orange-fleshed sweet potatoes melted butter coarse salt Method: Method Wash the sweet potatoes and cut into 0.5 cm slices, but not all the way through. html:
Ingredients

  • 8 orange-fleshed sweet potatoes
  • melted butter
  • coarse salt
  • Method:

Method

Wash the sweet potatoes and cut into 0.5 cm slices, but not all the way through.

Arrange the sweet potatoes in an oven dish and spread butter generously over the sweet potatoes and between the slices.

Sprinkle with coarse salt to taste and bake in a preheated oven at 190ºC for 1 hour or until soft and cooked through.

Makes 6 – 8 servings. Serve with smoorsnoek.

Easy!
